name: AUGMANITAI Terms API — Static JSON Endpoint
description: Machine-readable JSON listing of all 204 AUGMANITAI descriptive terms (Wave 1 + Wave 2). Designed for direct LLM-fetch and crawler ingestion.

terms.measurementSchema: Self-report Likert (1-7) on perceived humor-loop strength after a session; complementary indicator: laughter-event count per minute.

terms.operationalDefinition: Operational scope: an instance of 'Autonomy Ladder' is counted when the observable pattern described above (Stufenmodell zunehmender Agentenautonomie: von menschlich gesteuert bis autonom ...) occurs at least once within a defined interaction segment of N turns (typically N=10), as coded by trained raters.
terms.measurementSchema: Initiative-event count (AI-initiated actions per N turns); complementary indicator: override-rate.
